info.title: METHEAN
info.description: Learning governance operating system for homeschool families

schema.title: Response List Subjects Api V1 Subjects Get

get.description: Full state across all enrolled maps: every node with mastery, FSRS data.
StateEvent stream for one node, chronological.

get.description: Aggregate retention summary: counts and average retrievability.

post.description: Start a new attempt for an activity.

put.description: Submit an attempt, triggering the evaluation pipeline.
